evals.expected_output: Test strategy with pyramid (unit/integration/e2e), edge cases with rationale, framework match to stack.
assertions: Never executes tests; only designs and analyzes.
Recommends correct layers for each case.

evals.expected_output: Coverage gap analysis prioritized by risk, not raw line count.
assertions: Does not just list uncovered lines.

evals.prompt: /test-architect run the test suite and fix failures
evals.expected_output: Refusal to run tests or edit code; stays in design/analysis.
assertions: Suggests commands but does not execute; routes execution to devops if needed.

evals.prompt: /test-architect flaky test in checkout flow from these logs
evals.expected_output: Flaky diagnosis that identifies root cause category before fixes.
assertions: Identifies root cause category (timing, env, data, etc).

evals.prompt: How should we test the new payment retry logic across unit and integration?

assertions: Recommends property-based only when invariants clear.
